final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fashion-illustration-photorealistic-composite
Asset type: haute couture concept editorial, fashion week campaign visual
Primary request: conceptual fashion design rendering of a deep-sea-inspired haute couture gown series, blending fashion illustration and photographic composite style
Scene/backdrop: pure black studio background, professional multi-angle stage lighting
Subject: a floor-length evening gown on a standing model — skirt constructed from multiple layers of semi-transparent organza printed with jellyfish tentacle motifs, emitting mysterious blue-violet bioluminescent glow under light; structured corset bodice featuring three-dimensional embroidery replicating coral reef texture, encrusted with Swarovski crystals in blue, green, and purple
Style/medium: fashion illustration merged with photographic composite, haute couture editorial
Composition/framing: full-length frontal shot, model standing upright, centered, vertical portrait framing
Lighting/mood: dramatic multi-directional stage lighting that maximizes the translucency of organza layers and amplifies bioluminescent glow effects; luxurious and otherworldly atmosphere
Color palette: deep ocean blue, fluorescent violet, coral orange, with iridescent crystal accents
Materials/textures: layered semi-transparent organza with jellyfish tentacle print, 3D coral-texture embroidery, faceted Swarovski crystal embellishments, soft luminous glow diffusion
Constraints: preserve the bioluminescent glow effect on each organza layer; coral reef 3D embroidery on bodice must be clearly visible; crystal embellishments in blue, green, and purple must be distinct
Avoid: flat or matte fabric rendering, overexposed background, loss of translucency in organza layers, generic evening gown silhouette without deep-sea detailing
